trechos.trecho: Finally, scalability remains a persistent challenge because many quantum models face barriers when applied to complex systems, necessitating further research to evaluate their feasibility in real-world scenarios. 4.7.

Future research directions Future research in quantum AI should focus on developing more stable quantum hardwareparticularly superconducting, photonic, and hybrid qubits less affected by noisewhile optimizing hybrid quantumclassical models to boost efficiency in machine learning and optimization tasks and advancing encoding and data structuring methods to create datasets tailored for quantum algorithms.

Future research should prioritize improving qubit coherence, enhancing post-quantum cryptography, and developing scalable quantum architectures, thereby ensuring the feasi bility of these emerging technologies in real-world scenarios.
